title: Download OpenNeuro Dataset — on_download
text: id Dataset identifier (e.g., "ds000001"). tag Snapshot version tag. NULL (default), uses latest snapshot. files Character vector specific files download, single regex pattern (detected presence regex metacharacters). NULL (default), downloads files. subjects Character vector subject IDs (e.g., c("sub-01", "sub-02")) regex pattern wrapped regex() (e.g., regex("sub-0[1-5]")). Subject IDs can specified without "sub-" prefix. NULL (default), downloads subjects. include_derivatives TRUE (default) subjects specified, also include derivative outputs matching subjects derivatives/ directory. dest_dir Destination directory. NULL (default) use_cache TRUE, downloads cache location. NULL use_cache FALSE, creates ./dataset_id/ current working directory. use_cache TRUE (default) dest_dir NULL, downloads CRAN-compliant cache location. Set FALSE use current working directory. Ignored dest_dir explicitly provided. quiet TRUE, suppress progress output. Default FALSE. verbose TRUE, show per-file progress addition overall progress. Default FALSE. force TRUE, re-download files even exist correct size. Default FALSE. backend Backend use downloading: "datalad", "s3", "https". NULL (default), auto-selects best available backend priority: DataLad > S3 > HTTPS. title: Download OpenNeuro Dataset — on_download
text: default, files downloaded CRAN-compliant cache location (platform-specific, see Details). Repeat downloads files skipped automatically based manifest tracking. Cache locations platform: Mac: ~/Library/Caches/R/openneuroR Linux: ~/.cache/R/openneuroR Windows: ~/AppData/Local/R/cache/openneuroR dataset stored subdirectory dataset ID. manifest.json file tracks downloaded files, enabling automatic skip already-cached files repeat downloads. Backend selection: DataLad: Clones OpenNeuroDatasets GitHub git-annex. Provides cryptographic integrity verification. Requires datalad git-annex CLI tools. S3: Uses AWS CLI s3 sync fast parallel downloads. Requires aws CLI tool. HTTPS: Direct file downloads via httr2. Always available, external dependencies. Subject filtering: subjects specified, files belonging subjects downloaded, plus root-level files (e.g., dataset_description.json, participants.tsv). Subject IDs can provided without "sub-" prefix - "01" "sub-01" work. pattern matching, wrap pattern regex(). Patterns auto-anchored full subject ID matching, regex("sub-01") match "sub-01" "sub-010".

title: Download OpenNeuro Dataset — on_download
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Download to cache (default - auto-selects best backend) on_download("ds000001", files = "participants.tsv")  # Repeat download skips cached files result <- on_download("ds000001", files = "participants.tsv") result$skipped  # >= 1 (files already in cache)  # Download to specific directory (bypasses cache) on_download("ds000001", dest_dir = "~/data/openneuro")  # Download to current working directory on_download("ds000001", use_cache = FALSE)  # Force re-download of cached files on_download("ds000001", force = TRUE)  # Use specific backend on_download("ds000001", backend = "s3") on_download("ds000001", backend = "https")  # Force HTTPS  # Download specific subjects on_download("ds000001", subjects = c("sub-01", "sub-02"))  # Download subjects matching pattern on_download("ds000001", subjects = regex("sub-0[1-5]"))  # Download subjects without derivatives on_download("ds000001", subjects = c("01", "02"), include_derivatives = FALSE) } # }
